purpose: Recommended local adapter routing for stage-two deployment trials.

legal_opinion.reason: Best answer-only quality for the opinion path with no thought leakage.

legal_memo.reason: Best current structural performance on memo outputs with higher completion rates.

legal_analysis.reason: Best current analysis answer-only quality and citation clarity under the corrected generation budget.

fallback.reason: Stable general fallback if per-mode routing is unavailable.

notes: This is a deployment recommendation, not a training truth claim.
Keep the benchmark generation budget policy aligned with this routing decision.
